race.comment: CINNAMON KISS (8) resumes and looked close to a win before that break, finishing off with a minor placing over this trip at Great Western. Has trialled well leading into this and can run a bold race fresh. TAAJWAR (4) finds the maiden win elusive but has runs littered through his form that can take care of this if presented on-song. Will likely drift back from the wide draw and be saved for the final shot at them. TERRALIGHT (11) has been freshened with 32 days in between after closing off well into fourth when resuming at Mt Gambier. Has been kept up to the mark with a trial win and finds a nice race to break the ice. OH SO VEIN (6) pushed forward from a wide draw last time out and found the front, holding the lead for most of the way and sticking on well to finish third at Moe. Even fitter now and should give backers a sight again. MY BON AMIE (10) returns and has jumped out well in readiness, so is one to keep an eye on.
